name: applyProofTactic
description: Among available proof tactics, select a proof tactic to apply to the proof tree. Then specify the node ID and predicate ID to apply to. ***The proof tactic must match the selected predicate.***

proof_tactic.description:
arithmeticRewrite: Simplifies and normalises arithmetic expressions. cardinalityDefinition: Rewrites `card(S) = k` to `\exists f \cdot f \in (1..k >->> S)`. conjunction: Splits a conjunctive hypothesis into its conjuncts. disjunctionToImplicationRewrite: Rewrite `P \lor Q` to `
eg P \implies Q`. equality: Rewrites an equality and hides or deselects the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier. equivalence: Rewrite `P \leftrightarrow Q` to `(P \implies Q) \land (Q \implies P)`. finiteDefinition: Rewrite `finite(S)` to `\exists n \in NAT \cdot (\exists f \in (1..n \leftrightarrow S))`. functionalImageDefinition: Rewrite `f(x) = y` to `(x \mapsto y) \in f`. implicationAnd: Rewrite `P \implies (Q \land R)` to `(P \implies Q) \land (P \implies R)`. implicationOr: Rewrite `P \implies (Q \lor R)` to `(P \implies Q) \lor (P \implies R)`. partition: Rewrite `partition(S, A_1, ..., A_n)` to `S = A_1  union ...  union A_n \land A_i 
eq {} \land ( orall i 
eq j \cdot A_1  inter A_j = {})`. removeInclusion: Rewrite `A \subseteq B` to ` orall x \cdot (x \in A \implies x \in B)`. removeMembership: Rewrite `x \in S` based on the definition of S. removeNegation: Rewrite predicate to remove negation `
eg`. setEqual: Rewrite `A = B` to `(A \subseteq B) \land (B \subseteq A)`. setMinus: Rewrite `x \in (A \setminus B)` to `(x \in A) \land (x 
otin B)`. strictInclusion: Rewrite `A \subset B` to `(A \subseteq B) \land (A 
eq B)`. relationOverwriteDefinition: Rewrite `A \oplus B` to `({(x \mapsto y \in A) \mid (x 
otin dom(B))})  union B`.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.

predicate_id.description: ID of the predicate in the node to apply this function on.
